ensembleHTE 0.1.1

  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

blp()
Compute BLP (Best Linear Predictor) of CATE
blp_pred()
Compute BLP (Best Linear Predictor) for Prediction
clan()
Compute CLAN (Classification Analysis)
combine_ensembles()
Combine Multiple Ensemble Objects
ensemble_hte()
Fit Ensemble Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Model
ensemble_news()
Check for ensembleHTE Updates
ensemble_pred()
Fit Ensemble Prediction Model
gates()
Compute GATES (Group Average Treatment Effects)
gates_restricted()
Compare GATES: Unrestricted vs Restricted Ranking
gavs()
Compute GAVS (Group Averages)
gavs_restricted()
Compare GAVS: Unrestricted vs Restricted Ranking
ite()
Extract ITE Predictions as a Matrix
microcredit
Microcredit Experiment in the Philippines
microcredit_covariates
Control Covariates for the Microcredit Dataset
plot(<blp_pred_results>)
Plot method for blp_pred_results objects
plot(<blp_results>)
Plot method for blp_results objects
plot(<clan_results>)
Plot method for clan_results objects
plot(<gates_restricted_results>)
Plot method for gates_restricted_results objects
plot(<gates_results>)
Plot method for gates_results objects
plot(<gavs_restricted_results>)
Plot method for gavs_restricted_results objects
plot(<gavs_results>)
Plot method for gavs_results objects
print(<blp_pred_results>)
Print method for blp_pred_results objects
print(<blp_results>)
Print method for blp_results objects
print(<clan_results>)
Print method for clan_results objects
print(<ensemble_hte_fit>)
Print Method for ensemble_hte_fit Objects
print(<ensemble_pred_fit>)
Print Method for ensemble_pred_fit Objects
print(<gates_restricted_results>)
Print method for gates_restricted_results objects
print(<gates_results>)
Print method for gates_results objects
print(<gavs_restricted_results>)
Print method for gavs_restricted_results objects
print(<gavs_results>)
Print method for gavs_results objects
summary(<ensemble_hte_fit>)
Summary Method for ensemble_hte_fit Objects
summary(<ensemble_pred_fit>)
Summary Method for ensemble_pred_fit Objects
